message: 🌱 Add flagger: Support for istio's warmupDurationSecs mission (#542)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flagger-1350-support-for-istio-s-warmupdurationsecs",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flagger: Support for istio's warmupDurationSecs",
+    "description": "Support for istio's warmupDurationSecs. Requested by 15+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current flagger deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your flagger version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flagger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flagger\nhelm list -n flagger 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working flagger installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review flagger configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant flagger configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n flagger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flagger\nkubectl get configmap -n flagger -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flagger\n```\n## Describe the feature\n\nIstio [added](https://github.com/istio/api/pull/2153) in 2022 the ability to \"warm up\" traffic slowly with a new load balancer property called `warmupDurationSecs`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support for istio's warmupDurationSecs",
+        "description": "If I'm doing it wrong, please point it out to me.\n```yaml\n...\n    trafficPolicy:\n      loadBalancer:\n        simple: LEAST_REQUEST\n        warmupDurationSecs: 30s\n...\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flagger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flagger\nkubectl get events -n flagger --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support for istio's warmupDurationSecs\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the linked issue and PR for the community-verified solution.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "...\n    trafficPolicy:\n      loadBalancer:\n        simple: LEAST_REQUEST\n        warmupDurationSecs: 30s\n..."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "flagger",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "flagger"
+    ],

+    },
